title: Subitem automation for every time period if status is something notify someone

posts.author: aknight (Austin Knight)
posts.cookedHtml:
The only automation that comes close to what I need for notifying my team is the one seen in this uploaded file.

Screenshot_20221205_0741091636×854 18.9 KB

When will we have the ability to select a subitem status column in this automation? Or is there something already available that will notify a person if a subitem has been assigned to them but they have not changed the status to show that they have begun working on it after a certain time period? Ex. 1 day after being assigned task.

posts.author: chrisdavis (Chris Davis)
posts.cookedHtml:
The following screenshot was shared, but I am not seeing this as an option when I’m creating automations in Monday. Ideas?

Screen Shot 2019-08-15 at 11.40.261257×481 18.6 KB
